feedback.text: Good day, I too would like to encourage the inclusions of provisions to safeguard the consumer's right to retain access to software they have purchased. This right is either completely unenforced or non-existent at the moment, especially in regard to video games. For more information, please consult the european citizens' initiative named "Stop Destroying Videogames". Thank you for your consideration, I hope you have a wonderful day. With regards, a Concerned Citizen.
